common.siteDescription: Discover the best travel packs, find flights and gear up for your next adventure with our recommendations.
common.affiliateDisclosure: This site participates in affiliate programs from Amazon, GetYourGuide and Civitatis. By clicking affiliate links and making a purchase, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you.

home.title: {siteName} - Travel Packs, Flights & Gear
home.heroDescription: Curated travel packs with the best accommodations and local experiences. Your adventure starts here.
home.featuredDescription: Curated routes with the best accommodations and local experiences so you can just enjoy the ride.
home.flightCtaDescription: Compare prices and find the best flight deals to your next destination.
home.productsDescription: The essential products we recommend to make your trip comfortable and safe.

packs.title: Travel Packs
packs.metaDescription: Discover our curated travel packs with routes, accommodations and local experiences. From tropical adventures to cultural routes.
packs.description: Complete routes with selected accommodations and the best local experiences. Choose your adventure and start planning.
packs.noResults: No packs found with the selected filters.

packDetail.accommodationsDescription: Three options for every budget. All verified and with excellent ratings.
packDetail.experiencesDescription: The best activities selected to complement your trip.

flights.title: Search Flights
flights.metaDescription: Find the best flights for your next trip. Compare prices, choose your class and book at the best price.
flights.heading: Find your ideal flight
flights.description: Enter your travel details and we'll help you find the best flight options.
flights.tip1Description: Flying midweek (Tuesday and Wednesday) is usually cheaper. Try different date combinations.
flights.tip2Description: The best prices are usually found 6 to 8 weeks before the flight for European destinations.
flights.tip3Description: Sometimes flying to a nearby airport can save you hundreds of euros.

shop.title: Travel Shop
shop.metaDescription: Essential products for your trip: luggage, electronics, accessories and more. Real recommendations with links to Amazon.
shop.description: Our recommended products to make your trip a comfortable, safe and memorable experience.

footer.description: Your travel platform with the best packs, flights and gear for your next adventure.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Looks like this page went on a trip. Go back to the homepage to keep exploring.
